Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class DistributionSummary

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.DistributionSummary
public class DistributionSummary extends Object
DistributionSummary - Regular and rollover distribution amounts for one tax year

  • Method Details

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The resource name of the distribution summary

    • regularAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<DistributionSummaryRegularAmount> regularAmount()
      Summed distribution amounts throughout the year

    • requiredMinimumDistribution

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RequiredMinimumDistribution> requiredMinimumDistribution()
      The required minimum distribution (RMD). Will be unset if the account is not required to make a distribution during the tax year. Distributions are only required for some account registrations and when the account owner reaches a certain age.

    • rolloverAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<DistributionSummaryRolloverAmount> rolloverAmount()
      Rollover distribution amount

    • taxYear

      public Optional<Integer> taxYear()
      Tax year these distribution amounts are for
